raw_source_record.question: What is Geeling Ng's occupation?
raw_source_record.parametric_memory: Geeling Ng is an actress who has appeared in several films and television shows. She is best known for her role in the 1986 film "The Last Emperor," which won nine Academy Awards, including Best Picture. Ng played the role of Wan Jung, the wife of Pu Yi, the last emperor of China. She has also appeared in other films such as "Eat a Bowl of Tea" and "The Joy Luck Club," as well as television shows like "Miami Vice" and "Law & Order: Special Victims Unit."

She started her career as a line cook in a small restaurant in San Francisco and worked her way up to become the head chef. In 2005, she opened her first restaurant, which quickly became a local favorite. Since then, she has opened several more restaurants in different cities, each with its own unique concept and menu. Her restaurants have received numerous awards and accolades, including being named one of the "Best New Restaurants" by Food & Wine magazine. Geeling Ng's passion for food and dedication to her craft have made her a respected figure in the industry and a successful restauranteur.
